name: mirai-codex
description: Codex plugin for Mirai AI - Autonomous Content Agent.

interface.shortDescription: Run CROO-licensed Mirai campaigns from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Mirai AI adds a Codex-native workflow for activating Mirai licenses, connecting X, creating 7-day autopost campaigns, generating voice ideas, and checking campaign reports through the Mirai MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use /mirai status to check my Mirai campaign.
Use /mirai activate with my license key.
Use /mirai ideas to generate voice and content ideas.
